home.description: Find free toilets hidden in commercial buildings

signin.title: Sign in to toirepo
signin.subtitle: Find the hidden free toilets in Tokyo

verifyRequest.title: Check your email
verifyRequest.body: We've sent a login link to your email. Click it to finish signing in.

drawer.error: Failed to load, please try again
drawer.descriptionPlaceholder: Photos, reviews, and confirmations will be added in future updates.

detail.comingSoon: Photos, reviews, and confirmations will be added in future updates.

confirmation.errorTooFrequent: Too many confirmations — try again later

form.title: Write a review
form.moderationNote: AI pre-screen + human review before it shows publicly.
form.bodyPlaceholder: How was your visit? Clean? Warm water? Purchase required?
form.requireLogin: Sign in to write a review.
form.requireTrust: Submit one approved toilet to unlock reviews.
form.errorForbidden: Your trust level is too low
form.errorTooFrequent: Too many reviews — try again in an hour

appeal.editHint: Only fill fields you want to change. Unchanged values are ignored.
appeal.requireLogin: Sign in to submit an appeal.
appeal.emptyL0: Submit one approved toilet to unlock appeals.
appeal.errorReasonTooShort: Reason must be at least {min} characters
appeal.errorForbidden: Trust level too low or not allowed
appeal.errorDuplicate: You already have a pending appeal for this toilet
appeal.errorTooFrequent: Too many appeals — try again tomorrow

REPORT_NO_TOILET.label: No toilet here / non-customers refused
REPORT_NO_TOILET.description: I went and there's no usable toilet for outsiders
REPORT_NO_TOILET.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Visited and found no public toilet, or staff said customers only.

REPORT_CLOSED.label: Toilet/venue is closed
REPORT_CLOSED.description: The building or business is permanently closed
REPORT_CLOSED.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Closure notice on the door.

SUGGEST_EDIT.label: Suggest an edit
SUGGEST_EDIT.description: Name / address / type / floor needs correcting
SUGGEST_EDIT.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. The store renamed to XX, the listing has the old name.

REPORT_DATA_ERROR.label: Other data error
REPORT_DATA_ERROR.description: Something else is wrong with this listing

OWN_SUBMISSION_REJECT.label: Appeal my rejected submission
OWN_SUBMISSION_REJECT.description: My submission was rejected and I want it reviewed again
OWN_SUBMISSION_REJECT.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this should be approved.

SELF_SOFT_DELETE.label: Withdraw my own submission
SELF_SOFT_DELETE.description: Take a toilet I submitted off the map
SELF_SOFT_DELETE.reasonPlaceholder: Reason for withdrawal (incorrect info / privacy / other).

photo.title: Photos
photo.hint: Between 1 and 4 photos. We auto-compress and strip location data before upload.

location.title: Location
location.hint: Tap the map to drop a pin, or use the button to grab your current location.
location.geolocationFailed: Could not get current location. Please pick on the map.
location.geolocationUnsupported: This browser doesn't support geolocation. Please pick on the map.

type.title: Type
type.hint: Pick the best match for this toilet.

name.title: Name
name.hint: At least one language is required.

placeholder.zh-CN: 例：东京站 丸之内北口厕所
placeholder.ja: 例：東京駅 丸の内北口トイレ
placeholder.en: e.g. Tokyo Station Marunouchi North Restroom

accessNote.title: Access notes (optional)
accessNote.hint: Tell other users how to find this toilet.

placeholder.zh-CN: 例：从主入口进，沿左侧走廊到底右转。
placeholder.ja: 例：正面入口から入り、左通路を奥まで進んで右。
placeholder.en: e.g. Enter through main entrance, go down the left corridor, turn right at the end.

submissions.title: My submissions

empty.heading: No submissions yet
empty.body: Tap the button in the bottom-right to submit a toilet you've found.

submissions.loadError: Failed to load, please try again later
